full_text:
Guo Pei (Zhongnan) 郭配 (仲南)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Pei (郭配), styledZhongnan (仲南), was born in Taiyuan. Guo Huai’s younger brother. Had a good reputation. Was Grand Administrator of Chengyang. Guo Pei was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
